name: Cursed Order
short_description: Fight for Astaria's freedom as a revolution army against a kingdom-dominating cult with a bunch of teens in your party!
detailed_description:
--STORY--

There once was a kingdom filled with bliss and spirit called Astaria. It was a safe place for families to live and children to play. But one day, it suffered a dreadful fate brought to it by a terrible creature and the cult surrounding it. They are called the Cursed Order.
 

Find what your fate entails as a powerful teenage boy who lost his memories before being found by the revolution camp. As you adventure along, meeting charming characters on the way in this story-rich, delightful game full of fun dialogue while chaos ensues, relive the memories of someone and see shadows that lurk around where death reeks the most. 

Who, truly, are you? Why would this cult free such a wretched beast? Why were you selected to have such powers? Why is there a low-budget dog? Will the revolution camp be able to truly stop this government once and for all?

--FEATURES ᕙ(`▿´)ᕗ--

-NEGOTIATE WITH ENEMIES!

-MEET LOW BUDGET DOG!

-BEAT UP VEGETABLES WITH RHYTHM MINIGAME!

-FIGHT AGAINST A LITERAL CULT?!?!?

-WATCH CHILDREN'S HAIRCUTS GET DEMOLISHED!

-FIND YOUR MENTALLY UNSTABLE SIBLING!

-Don’t eat ants. (please).

-GET EXECUTED TOMORROW!

-ALSO LOW BUDGET DOG CAN DANCE NOW!

-(For your own safety, do not interact with the green haired girl, she's pretty weird...).
